description: Mock implementation pattern: NullPersistence is in-memory mock for testing with clear() method. MockAuthService should follow same approach.
relevantCode: export class NullPersistence implements IPersistenceService { private store = new Map<string, any>(); clear(): void { this.store.clear() } }
recommendation: Create MockAuthService with in-memory user store, configurable delays, and clear() for test isolation.
